content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp:
     1	#include "SYsULexer.h" // 确保这里的头文件名与您生成的词法分析器匹配
     2	#include <fstream>
     3	#include <iostream>
     4	#include <unordered_map>
     5	#include <regex>
     6	#include <string>
     7	
     8	// 文件名和行号偏移的映射表
     9	// 每个条目包含：ANTLR起始行号、文件名、lineOffset
    10	#include <vector>
    11	struct FileMapping {
    12	  int antlrStartLine;
    13	  std::string filename;
    14	  int lineOffset;
    15	};
    16	std::vector<FileMapping> fileMappings;
    17	std::string defaultFilename = "<unknown>";
    18	
    19	// 映射定义，将ANTLR的tokenTypeName映射到clang的格式
    20	std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
    21	  { "Int", "int" },
    22	  { "Identifier", "identifier" },
    23	  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
    24	  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
    25	  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },
    26	  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },
    27	  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
    28	  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },
    29	  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },
    30	  { "Return", "return" },
    31	  { "Semi", "semi" },
    32	  { "EOF", "eof" },
    33	  { "Equal", "equal" },
    34	  { "Plus", "plus" },
    35	  { "Comma", "comma" },
    36	  { "Minus", "minus" },
    37	  { "Star", "star" },
    38	  { "Slash", "slash" },
    39	  { "Percent", "percent" },
    40	  { "Less", "less" },
    41	  { "Greater", "greater" },
    42	  { "LessEqual", "lessequal" },
    43	  { "GreaterEqual", "greaterequal" },
    44	  { "EqualEqual", "equalequal" },
    45	  { "NotEqual", "exclaimequal" },
    46	  { "AndAnd", "ampamp" },
    47	  { "OrOr", "pipepipe" },
    48	  { "Exclaim", "exclaim" },
    49	  { "Amp", "amp" },
    50	  { "If", "if" },
    51	  { "While", "while" },
    52	  { "Break", "break" },
    53	  { "Continue", "continue" },
    54	  { "Const", "const" },
    55	  { "Void", "void" },
    56	};
